scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c cyan,green "npm run dev -w @estatepilot/web" "npm run dev -w @estatepilot/api"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @estatepilot/shared && npm run build -w @estatepilot/api && npm run build -w @estatepilot/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @estatepilot/api && npm run lint -w @estatepilot/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @estatepilot/api && npm run test -w @estatepilot/web
